title: Implement MQTT client, autostart, and broker.json
description:
## Scope
- Add MQTT publish/subscribe client with shared topic namespace.
- Implement Mosquitto autostart and broker.json metadata.
- Apply broker discovery precedence as documented.

## Definition of Done
- MQTT works end to end in both runtimes.
- broker.json is written on autostart with endpoint and pid.
creator: ryan.porter
